description: Sync posts, pages, users, media, categories, and tags from a WordPress site via the WordPress REST API v2 using Application Passwords.

install_fields.label: WordPress Site URL
install_fields.help: The full URL of your WordPress site (e.g. https://myblog.com). Must not include a trailing slash.

install_fields.label: Application Password
install_fields.placeholder: xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx
install_fields.help: An Application Password generated in WordPress Admin → Users → Profile → Application Passwords. Requires WordPress 5.6+.
